_comment: Pin of the current minted release's server bundle. nix/module.nix's serverArchive option defaults to fetching this release's GitHub asset (repo/tag/assetName) via pkgs.fetchurl, verified against `sha256` at build time - a real declarative fetch, not a runtime check. This repo is public, so that url needs no credentials. Regenerated by scripts/update_nix_release.py at every release cut (see HANDOFF.md's release pipeline) -- do not hand-edit except for emergencies, and re-run the script afterward to confirm the hash still matches. An optional `modrinth` object may also be present if the pin was generated with --modrinth; nothing in the module reads it today, and it stays absent while the Modrinth project is in draft (#44).
